mapper.select:
SELECT pt.id, pt.name, pt.type, pt.categ_id, pt.list_price, pt.standard_price, pt.default_code, pt.barcode, pt.active, pt.company_id, pt.description FROM product_template pt LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON pc.id = pt.categ_id
AND ( pt.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR pt.default_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR pt.barcode ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR pc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
AND pt.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND pt.default_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.defaultCode}, '%')
AND pc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.categName}, '%')
AND pt.company_id = #{query.companyId}
AND pt.active = #{query.active}
ORDER BY pt.id DESC
